highlights.title: Elon Musk Says He Wants to Get SpaceX IPO Underway ‘Pretty Soon’
highlights.description: Elon Musk said he’s back in Texas working on plans for an initial public offering of SpaceX as the rocket and artificial intelligence company gears up for the largest listing of all time.

highlights.title: How Elon Musk and Sam Altman went from besties to bitter rivals
highlights.description: In the 11 years since Elon Musk and Sam Altman helped start OpenAI, their once tight bond has unwound, leaving the two billionaires fighting it out in court.

highlights.title: HYPE pops 7%, beating bitcoin declines, as SpaceX pre-IPO lands on Hyperliquid
highlights.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE token rallied 7% over 24 hours after Trade.xyz launched the first pre-IPO perpetual market on the platform, offering synthetic exposure to SpaceX at a reference valuation of $1.78 trillion.

highlights.title: DraftKings, Meta, AI Firms Have a New Election Playbook: Flood State-Level Races With Cash
highlights.description: With Congress largely stalemated, companies turn to states to gain leverage over regulations.

highlights.title: Baidu AI Sales Eclipse Waning Legacy Ads for the First Time
highlights.description: Baidu Inc. posted a better-than-feared 1% drop in revenue after growth in nascent AI businesses offset a steady decline in traditional internet revenue, buying the search leader time to catch rivals such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. in the post-ChatGPT era.

highlights.title: Elon Musk Really Needs Starship to Work This Time
highlights.description: With the V3 launch, SpaceX hopes to prove that the massive vehicle it’s betting everything on will perform as advertised.

highlights.title: Crypto security is turning into an AI arms race as agents may overwhelm compliance teams
highlights.description: AI agents and automated payments could reach a scale that crypto monitoring systems built for human-paced markets cannot handle, Elliptic CEO Simone Maini warned.

highlights.title: Samsung Shares Jump After High-Stakes Labor Talks Resume
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co.’s shares climbed more than 6% after its union signaled a willingness to negotiate and a local court granted the company’s request to curtail a potential strike, blunting the chances of a major chip production disruption.

highlights.title: Chipmaker CXMT Reports Eightfold Jump in Sales on Path to IPO
highlights.description: ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. reported soaring revenue and profit in the first quarter and forecast higher earnings ahead, bolstering its financials ahead of a high-profile initial public offering later this year.

highlights.title: Samsung meeting transcripts show memory workers offered incredible 607% bonus worth $477,000, while logic chip staff get as little as 50% — union says misbalance 'creates a retention crisis the company cannot afford'
highlights.description: Internal Samsung wage negotiation transcripts show the company proposed bonuses of 607% of annual salary for its memory chip division in March,

ai.title: Microsoft ditches Teams feature that put attendees into the same virtual room
ai.description: Microsoft said 'Together' mode added too much 'implementation complexity' and will steer users toward the Teams' gallery view instead.

ai.title: An ICE Firearms Trainer Was Involved in At Least 4 Deadly Shootings
ai.description: David Norman, a former Phoenix police officer who’s described himself as “a fucking savage,” now runs a company that provided training to Homeland Security’s Special Response Teams.

ai.title: US, Philippines Moving ‘Very Quickly’ on 4,000-Acre AI Hub Plan
ai.description: The US and the Philippines are moving “very, very quickly” on a planned artificial intelligence and supply chain hub in the Southeast Asian nation, a top US official said, as Washington seeks long-term protection for American investors.

ai.title: Google tells database devs to lean hard on AI for PostgreSQL work
ai.description: Cloud giant says humans remain accountable, even when code gets an assist from the machines

ai.title: Supercharging Immune Cells May Help Control HIV Long-Term
ai.description: CAR-T cell therapy is already a potent treatment for certain cancers. Now, a small study is showing early promise for managing HIV.

ai.title: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?
ai.description: Apparently anyone can vibe code anything these days. So Claude and I tried to make a database for tracking the petty grievances of the masses.

ai.title: Can AI Drug Development Live Up to the Hype?
ai.description: Big Pharma is pouring money into tech-devised treatments, but the verdict is out on whether they’ll actually work.

ai.title: Mozilla warns UK: Breaking VPNs will not magically fix Britain's age-check mess
ai.description: Firefox maker says the tools are basic security infrastructure, not teenage contraband

ev_autonomous.title: Samsung granted court injunction against imminent strike action in last-minute reprieve — talks resume as unions barred from occupying or locking facilities, obstructing workers
ev_autonomous.description: Samsung has been granted an injunction to limit the scope of planned strike action ahead of an 18-day walkout due to start on Thursday.

ev_autonomous.title: Aave restores ether borrowing limits after $230 million exploit
ev_autonomous.description: The DeFi lending protocol reversed restrictions imposed after April’s $292 million exploit, restoring borrowing capacity across six networks as contagion fears ease.

crypto.title: Fed minutes, Meta stablecoin Senate deadline: Crypto Week Ahead
crypto.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 18.
